phrases.name: Replay List - Usage General Options
phrases.english_text:
General Options:
	player=<name> - Filter by player name
	steamid=<id> - Filter by Steam ID
	map=<name> - Filter by map name (default: current map)
	offset=<num> - Skip first N results
	limit=<num> - Limit results (max 20)

phrases.name: Replay List - Usage Type Options
phrases.english_text:
Type Options:
	Run: mode=<mode> course=<name> maxtime=<sec> maxteleports=<num> numstyles=<num>
	Jump: jumptype=<type> mindistance=<dist>
	Manual: saver=<name> ssid=<steamid>

phrases.name: Tip - website
phrases.english_text: {grey}Visit official CS2KZ website for up-to-date maps, records and servers: {default}https://cs2kz.org{grey}

phrases.name: Tip - kz_jstier
phrases.english_text: {grey}Use {default}/jstier {grey}to set your minimum jumpstats reporting tier.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_jsextend
phrases.english_text: {grey}Use {default}/jsextend {grey}to toggle extended jumpstats reporting in chat.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_replays
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!replays {grey}to list available replays in the server.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rpgoto
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rpgoto <time> {grey}to jump to a specific time in the replay.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rpgototick
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rpgototick <tick> {grey}to jump to a specific tick in the replay.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rpinfo
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rpinfo {grey}to show information about the current replay.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rppause
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rppause {grey}to pause or resume the replay playback.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rploadprogress
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rploadprogress {grey}to check the loading progress of a replay.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rpseek
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rpseek <+/-time> {grey}to relatively seek to a time in the replay.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rpsave
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rpsave <seconds> {grey}to save a manual replay of up to the specified duration.

phrases.name: Tip - Replay Storage Policy
phrases.english_text: {grey}Older or less important replays may be automatically removed over time to free up server space. Saving new manual replays can overwrite previous ones.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_rphidelegs
phrases.english_text: {grey}Type {default}!rphidelegs {grey}to toggle the visibility of the replay bot's first person legs.

phrases.name: Tip - kz_comparelevel
phrases.english_text: {grey}You can select different benchmarks to compare your run against by using {default}/comparelevel{grey}.
